extortion.description: Title XI Software Solutions is a software and support company supplying secure cloud based case management software as well as electronic discovery and litigation support to bankruptcy trustees, fiduciaries and professionals.We are ready to upload more than 50 GB of essential corporate documents. Huge amount of customer personal information (claims, financial statements, passport/DL/ssn scans and so on), employee information, financial data, court documents, NDAs, etc.
